items.name: approvals-core
items.title: Approvals core
items.description: Headless core for approval policies: Zod schema (gates, quorums, conditions, SLAs), a policy lint with structural errors and best-practice warnings, a step-level diff, and deterministic edit ops for safe LLM or form-driven edits.

items.name: approval-node
items.title: Approval node
items.description: The approval gate card for React Flow: approvers with unassigned seats, quorum badge, condition pill, SLA badge, plus diff, validation, and live-status rings.

items.name: terminal-node
items.title: Terminal node
items.description: Approved and rejected outcome pills for React Flow.

items.name: workflow-canvas
items.title: Workflow canvas
items.description: Renders an ApprovalPolicy as a laid-out React Flow graph: automatic layout on real node sizes (react-flow-auto-layout), aligned step edges, diff and status overlays, click-to-select and pan-to-focus.

items.name: validation-panel
items.title: Validation panel
items.description: Lists policy issues with severities: structural errors that should block activation and best-practice warnings (segregation of duties, single approver on high value, unassigned seats). Click an issue to focus the step on the canvas.

items.name: nl-edit-panel
items.title: Plain-language edit panel
items.description: Edit the policy in plain English behind a human gate: a proposer (your LLM, or the bundled deterministic demo parser) returns a proposed policy plus its diff, the user reviews and applies or discards. Nothing lands without the click.
